message:
feat(stats_dashboard): Add statistics dashboard with Theme styling (bd-18k)

Add stats_dashboard module for rendering archive statistics with:
- humanize_bytes(): Format bytes as KB/MB/GB/TB
- format_percentage(): Safe percentage formatting with zero handling
- StorageInfo: Track archive/index/database sizes
- StatsDashboard: Render stats using Theme system
  - Overview panel with total document counts
  - Content breakdown with bar chart visualization
  - Storage panel with component sizes
  - Date range panel with span calculation
  - Plain text fallback for non-TTY output

Includes 16 unit tests covering all utility functions and rendering paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
